sentences.arabic: كَانَ بِجَانِبِ الْقَرْيَةِ نَهْرٌ صَغِيرٌ يُحِبُّهُ الأَطْفَالُ.
sentences.translation: Pored sela je bila mala rijeka koju su djeca voljela.
sentences.translationEn: Beside the village there was a small river that children loved.

sentences.arabic: ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ جَرَفَ الْمَاءُ كُرَةَ طِفْلٍ صَغِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana je voda odnijela loptu malog dječaka.
sentences.translationEn: One day the water carried away a small boy's ball.

sentences.arabic: رَأَى وَلَدٌ اسْمُهُ مَرْوَانُ الأَمْرَ فَبَحَثَ عَنْ عَصًا طَوِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Dječak po imenu Mervan je vidio to i potražio je dugu granu.
sentences.translationEn: A boy named Marwan saw this and looked for a long stick.

sentences.arabic: أَخْرَجَ الْكُرَةَ مِنَ النَّهْرِ وَأَعَادَهَا إِلَى صَاحِبِهَا.
sentences.translation: Izvukao je loptu iz rijeke i vratio je vlasniku.
sentences.translationEn: He pulled the ball out of the river and returned it to its owner.
